_comment: Pre-generated sample responses for the /p/ai-readiness-audit demo input. If the user submits the exact sample URL, main.py returns this blob immediately instead of fetching live content.

59ed5b14683b9ec00593fa1255242ae025795bca.score_rationale: The public story is clearly about shipping and hosting AI apps, and the surrounding docs and examples imply real implementation depth rather than generic AI messaging. The page would look more production-ready with more explicit customer proof, eval language, and quantified operating evidence.
risks: no public evals or benchmark metrics
customer proof and case studies are limited
technical credibility is present but spread across multiple pages
opportunities: add one quantified case study with before-and-after metrics
publish a short architecture page covering runtime limits and guardrails
show one end-to-end app walkthrough with screenshots and latency detail
59ed5b14683b9ec00593fa1255242ae025795bca.next_action: Publish a single proof-of-work case study that shows one app moving from spec or repo to live endpoint with metrics, screenshots, and guardrails.
